subject: [AAI] Update chart with service account
commit_message:
[AAI] Update chart with service account

Add service account to requirements.yaml, values.yaml and deployment/statefulset

Issue-ID: OOM-2704
Signed-off-by: farida azmy <farida.azmy.ext@orange.com>
Co-authored-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>
Change-Id: Id03799f7a7ed1a031c7d819999496b18bac80881

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/911/ : FAILURE

It seems that you don"t have a commit body.

You must add at least one sentence explaining the purpose of the commit ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/911/ )

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/911/ )
